# MuleSoft A2A Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.1) of A2A Connector documentation.
> See [A2A Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/a2a-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the A2A Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Using Anypoint Code Builder to Configure A2A Connector 1.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/a2a-connector/latest/a2a-connector-acb.md)
- [A2A Connector 1.1 - Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/a2a-connector/latest/a2a-connector-examples.md)
- [A2A Connector 1.1 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/a2a-connector/latest/a2a-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure A2A Connector 1.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/a2a-connector/latest/a2a-connector-studio.md)
- [A2A Connector 1.1 Troubleshooting](https://docs.mulesoft.com/a2a-connector/latest/a2a-connector-troubleshooting.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating A2A Connector to Version 1.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/a2a-connector/latest/a2a-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [A2A Connector 1.1 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/a2a-connector/latest/a2a-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [A2A Connector 1.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/a2a-connector/latest/index.md)
